name: Bard Quartet
description: Quad programmable quantizer with integrated keyboard interface. Four channels, 8 harmonies, 10 memory slots. Supports microtuning, arpeggiator, channel grouping, and harmony progressions for full song structures.

controls.name: Keyboard Buttons
controls.description: 12 keyboard buttons to set notes per scale per channel. Active note shines brighter for real-time note monitoring.
controls.detail: One octave of chromatic keys · C# and D# = Load/Save in Memory menu

controls.name: Harmony Potentiometer
controls.description: Navigates between 8 different harmony locations for the active channel, enabling harmonic progressions. Also used for microtuning (+/-50 cents).
controls.detail: 8 harmony positions per channel · ±50 cents in microtuning mode

controls.name: Channel Buttons
controls.description: Select the active channel being edited (1–4). Hold + another channel button to create a group that shares scale settings.
controls.detail: 4 channel buttons · grouped channels share LED illumination

controls.name: Edit Button
controls.description: Opens Edit menu for Octave setting, Trigger Out assignment, Gate In assignment, and Transpose mode per channel and harmony.
controls.detail: Octave: -3 to +3 · hold 2s for Tuning Mode output

controls.name: µTune / Option Button
controls.description: Opens microtuning menu to detune any note ±50 cents. Also used with Edit to access Options menu. Long press with Harmony pot dissociates pot from current harmony.
controls.detail: ±50 cents per note · Edit+µTune = Options menu

controls.name: ARPG / Memory Button
controls.description: Opens Arpeggiator menu (hold channel button to enable arp per channel). With Edit = Memory menu for saving/loading 10 slots.
controls.detail: Arpeggiator modes: Up / Down / Pendulum / Spiral / Random · 1–4 octave spread

inputs.name: IN 1–4 (Channel CV)
inputs.description: V/Oct CV inputs for each of the four quantizer channels.

inputs.name: TRSP (Transpose CV)
inputs.description: Transpose CV input. Can work as pre-quantize, post-quantize, or octave transposer per channel (set in Edit menu).

inputs.name: Gate Input
inputs.description: Gate input used as Track & Hold (default) or Sample & Hold (selectable in Options). Assigned per channel in Edit menu.

inputs.name: Harmony CV
inputs.description: CV input for Harmony potentiometer position, selecting between the 8 harmony locations.

outputs.name: OUT 1–4 (Channel CV)
outputs.description: Quantized V/Oct outputs for each channel. Supports V/Oct, Hz/V, and 1.2V/Oct output norms.

outputs.name: HRMN (Harmony CV)
outputs.description: Harmony CV output mirroring the current harmony position for use with other modules.

outputs.name: TRIG OUT
outputs.description: Trigger output that fires each time a note change is detected on an assigned channel.

behaviors.name: Scale Programming
behaviors.description: Use keyboard buttons to activate/deactivate notes per channel per harmony. Up to 320 scales storable (4 channels × 8 harmonies × 10 memory slots).

behaviors.name: Harmony Progression
behaviors.description: 8 independent harmony settings per channel. Navigate via pot or CV to create chord progressions and song structures. Changes also affect Edit, Arp, microtuning, and grouping.

behaviors.name: Arpeggiator
behaviors.description: Each channel can become an arpeggiator driven by triggers at its CV input instead of continuous voltage. Modes: Up, Down, Pendulum, Spiral, Random. 1–4 octave spread per channel and harmony.

behaviors.name: Microtuning
behaviors.description: Each note in each channel and harmony can be detuned ±50 cents independently. Tuning setting is stored per harmony. Harmony pot navigates freely when µTune held.

behaviors.name: Channel Grouping
behaviors.description: Grouped channels share scale settings (and optionally Edit, Microtuning, Arpeggiator settings per Options menu). Indicated by simultaneous LED illumination.

behaviors.name: Channel Interaction (Normalization / Shift Register)
behaviors.description: When 0V detected at a channel input, G#=Normalization (follow previous channel), A#=Shift Register (follow previous on gate trigger). Enables cascading voice effects.

patchIdeas.name: Harmonic progression sequencer
patchIdeas.patch: LFO or sequencer → HRMN CV · all 4 channels play different scale roles · Harmony pot advances through 8 chord positions
patchIdeas.diagram:
BARD QUARTET:
- Sequencer (CV) >> Bard Quartet (Harmony CV) // advances 8 chord positions
- Sequencer (Pitch) p> Bard Quartet (IN 1)
- Bard Quartet (OUT 1) p> VCO 1 (V/Oct)
- Bard Quartet (OUT 2) p> VCO 2 (V/Oct)
- Bard Quartet (OUT 3) p> VCO 3 (V/Oct)
- Bard Quartet (OUT 4) p> VCO 4 (V/Oct)

patchIdeas.name: Polyphonic arp
patchIdeas.patch: 4 channels as arpeggiatores · clock → all CV inputs · different scales per channel · TRSP for transposition
patchIdeas.diagram:
BARD QUARTET:
* ARPG: enabled on CH 1-4
- Clock (Out) c> Bard Quartet (IN 1)
- Clock (Out) c> Bard Quartet (IN 2)
- Clock (Out) c> Bard Quartet (IN 3)
- Clock (Out) c> Bard Quartet (IN 4)
- LFO (CV) >> Bard Quartet (TRSP) // transposes all channels
- Bard Quartet (OUT 1) p> VCO 1 (V/Oct)
- Bard Quartet (OUT 2) p> VCO 2 (V/Oct)

patchIdeas.name: Shift register melody
patchIdeas.patch: A# option ON for channels 2-4 · gate sequence → Gate input · channel 1 plays melody · channels 2-4 echo it with delay
patchIdeas.diagram:
BARD QUARTET:
* CH 2-4: A# shift register mode
- Sequencer (Pitch) p> Bard Quartet (IN 1)
- Clock (Gate) g> Bard Quartet (Gate Input) // advances shift register
- Bard Quartet (OUT 1) p> VCO 1 (V/Oct)
- Bard Quartet (OUT 2) p> VCO 2 (V/Oct)
- Bard Quartet (OUT 3) p> VCO 3 (V/Oct)
- Bard Quartet (OUT 4) p> VCO 4 (V/Oct)

patchIdeas.name: SATB Vocal Quartet (Bass/Tenor/Alto/Soprano)
patchIdeas.patch: Four-part chorale · each harmony stores a root-position 4-note chord · harmony sequencer walks the song · clock gates Track & Hold · TRIG OUT retriggers envelopes on all voices
patchIdeas.diagram:
BARD QUARTET:
* Arp: OFF · 8 harmonies = 4-note chord voicings
- Sequencer (Out) >> Bard Quartet (HRMN) // walks chord changes
- Clock (Out) g> Bard Quartet (Gate)
- Bard Quartet (OUT 1) p> Bass VCO (V/Oct)
- Bard Quartet (OUT 2) p> Tenor VCO (V/Oct)
- Bard Quartet (OUT 3) p> Alto VCO (V/Oct)
- Bard Quartet (OUT 4) p> Soprano VCO (V/Oct)
- Bard Quartet (TRIG) t> Envelope (Trig) // retrigger all voices

patchIdeas.name: Harmonic Orbit (HRMN-driven progression)
patchIdeas.patch: Slow LFO sweeps 8 harmonies programmed as I-vi-IV-V-iii-IV-ii-V · lead melody plays over auto-changing S&H pad voicings from CH2-4
patchIdeas.diagram:
BARD QUARTET:
* Harmonies 1-8: I-vi-IV-V-iii-IV-ii-V
- Slow LFO (Out) >> Bard Quartet (HRMN)
- Sequencer (Out) p> Bard Quartet (IN 1)
- Clock (Out) g> Bard Quartet (Gate) // S&H pads
- Bard Quartet (OUT 1) p> Lead VCO (V/Oct)
- Bard Quartet (OUT 2) p> Pad VCO 1 (V/Oct)
- Bard Quartet (OUT 3) p> Pad VCO 2 (V/Oct)
- Bard Quartet (OUT 4) p> Pad VCO 3 (V/Oct)

patchIdeas.name: Shift Register Chord Crawler
patchIdeas.patch: Single melody cascades CH1→CH2→CH3→CH4 via A# shift register · each channel offset +0/+5/+7/+12 semis · rolling 4-note voicing from one CV line
patchIdeas.diagram:
BARD QUARTET:
* CH 2-4: A# shift register · octaves +0/+5/+7/+12
- Sequencer (Out) p> Bard Quartet (IN 1)
- Clock (Out) g> Bard Quartet (Gate) // rising edge shifts
- Bard Quartet (OUT 1) -> Mixer (In 1)
- Bard Quartet (OUT 2) -> Mixer (In 2)
- Bard Quartet (OUT 3) -> Mixer (In 3)
- Bard Quartet (OUT 4) -> Mixer (In 4)

patchIdeas.name: Polytonal Quartet (4 keys at once)
patchIdeas.patch: Each channel locked to different key center for deliberate polytonal drift · CH1 C major · CH2 F# major · CH3 Bb Dorian · CH4 E minor pentatonic · no TRSP, no grouping
patchIdeas.diagram:
BARD QUARTET:
* CH1=C maj · CH2=F# maj · CH3=Bb Dor · CH4=E min pent
- LFO 1 (Out) >> Bard Quartet (IN 1)
- LFO 2 (Out) >> Bard Quartet (IN 2)
- LFO 3 (Out) >> Bard Quartet (IN 3)
- LFO 4 (Out) >> Bard Quartet (IN 4)
- Bard Quartet (OUT 1) p> VCO 1 (V/Oct)
- Bard Quartet (OUT 2) p> VCO 2 (V/Oct)
- Bard Quartet (OUT 3) p> VCO 3 (V/Oct)
- Bard Quartet (OUT 4) p> VCO 4 (V/Oct)

patchIdeas.name: Parallel Harmonizer (Root/3rd/5th/Octave)
patchIdeas.patch: Melody CV multed to all 4 channels · same scale with degree offsets +0/+2/+4/+7 · Harmony knob morphs chord qualities across I-IV-V banks
patchIdeas.diagram:
BARD QUARTET:
* Same scale all CH · offsets +0/+3rd/+5th/+oct
- Melody VCO (CV) -> Mult (In)
- Mult (Out1) p> Bard Quartet (IN 1)
- Mult (Out2) p> Bard Quartet (IN 2)
- Mult (Out3) p> Bard Quartet (IN 3)
- Mult (Out4) p> Bard Quartet (IN 4)
- Bard Quartet (OUT 1) p> VCO 1 (V/Oct)
- Bard Quartet (OUT 2) p> VCO 2 (V/Oct)
- Bard Quartet (OUT 3) p> VCO 3 (V/Oct)
- Bard Quartet (OUT 4) p> VCO 4 (V/Oct)

patchIdeas.name: Arp + 3 Drones
patchIdeas.patch: CH1-3 hold root/3rd/5th per harmony · CH4 arpeggiates same chord UP with octave spread 2 · sequencer walks HRMN for progression · TRIG OUT doubles as drum accent
patchIdeas.diagram:
BARD QUARTET:
* CH4: Arp UP · octave spread 2
- Clock (Out) c> Bard Quartet (IN 4) // arp clock
- Sequencer (Out) >> Bard Quartet (HRMN)
- Bard Quartet (OUT 1) p> Drone VCO 1 (V/Oct)
- Bard Quartet (OUT 2) p> Drone VCO 2 (V/Oct)
- Bard Quartet (OUT 3) p> Drone VCO 3 (V/Oct)
- Bard Quartet (OUT 4) p> Arp VCO (V/Oct)
- Bard Quartet (TRIG) t> Drum (Accent)

patchIdeas.name: Quad Arp Polyrhythm
patchIdeas.patch: All 4 channels in Arp mode · clock divider /3 /5 /7 /8 feeds Expander gate ins · HRMN walks chords · octave spreads 1/2/3/4 for cascading polyrhythm · requires Bard Quartet Expand
patchIdeas.diagram:
BARD QUARTET:
* All CH: Arp · spreads 1/2/3/4 · Expander required
- Clock Divider (/3) c> Expander (Gate 1)
- Clock Divider (/5) c> Expander (Gate 2)
- Clock Divider (/7) c> Expander (Gate 3)
- Clock Divider (/8) c> Expander (Gate 4)
- LFO (Out) >> Bard Quartet (HRMN)
- Bard Quartet (OUT 1) p> VCO 1 (V/Oct)
- Bard Quartet (OUT 2) p> VCO 2 (V/Oct)
- Bard Quartet (OUT 3) p> VCO 3 (V/Oct)
- Bard Quartet (OUT 4) p> VCO 4 (V/Oct)

patchIdeas.name: Microtonal Raga Channel
patchIdeas.patch: CH1 retuned to 22-shruti raga via µTune ±50¢ · CH2-4 stay 12-TET Ionian pad · TRSP routed POST-quantize on CH1 so raga intervals survive transposition
patchIdeas.diagram:
BARD QUARTET:
* CH1: raga scale + µTune · TRSP=POST · CH2-4=Ionian
- Drone VCO (CV) p> Bard Quartet (IN 1)
- Keyboard (CV) >> Bard Quartet (TRSP)
- Clock (Out) g> Bard Quartet (Gate)
- Bard Quartet (OUT 1) p> Sitar VCO (V/Oct)
- Bard Quartet (OUT 2) p> Pad VCO 1 (V/Oct)
- Bard Quartet (OUT 3) p> Pad VCO 2 (V/Oct)
- Bard Quartet (OUT 4) p> Pad VCO 3 (V/Oct)

patchIdeas.name: TRIG-OUT Percussion Conductor
patchIdeas.patch: Random S&H CV feeds CH1 · every detected note-change fires drums via TRIG OUT · GATE IN from sequencer shapes deliberate melodic cadence over chaotic percussion
patchIdeas.diagram:
BARD QUARTET:
- S&H (Out) >> Bard Quartet (IN 1)
- Sequencer (Gate) g> Bard Quartet (Gate)
- Bard Quartet (OUT 1) p> Lead VCO (V/Oct)
- Bard Quartet (TRIG) t> Drum Envelope (Trig) // fires on note change
- Bard Quartet (TRIG) c> Rhythm Sequencer (Clock)

patchIdeas.name: Split TRSP Routing (Pre/Post/Octave)
patchIdeas.patch: One keyboard CV into TRSP produces 4 simultaneous results · CH1=PRE (chromatic) · CH2=POST (diatonic) · CH3=OCTAVE · CH4=OFF static drone · shared Clock gates all
patchIdeas.diagram:
BARD QUARTET:
* CH1 TRSP=PRE · CH2=POST · CH3=OCT · CH4=OFF
- Keyboard (CV) >> Bard Quartet (TRSP)
- Clock (Out) g> Bard Quartet (Gate)
- Sequencer (Out) p> Bard Quartet (IN 1)
- Bard Quartet (OUT 1) p> VCO 1 (V/Oct)
- Bard Quartet (OUT 2) p> VCO 2 (V/Oct)
- Bard Quartet (OUT 3) p> VCO 3 (V/Oct)
- Bard Quartet (OUT 4) p> VCO 4 (V/Oct)

patchIdeas.name: Grouped Wide Chord + Independent Bass/Lead
patchIdeas.patch: CH2+CH3 grouped for wide pad sharing scale at +octave · CH1 independent bassline · CH4 independent lead · slow seq walks HRMN for chord changes
patchIdeas.diagram:
BARD QUARTET:
* CH2+CH3 grouped (+oct) · CH1=bass · CH4=lead
- Bass Seq (Out) p> Bard Quartet (IN 1)
- Pad Trig (Gate) g> Bard Quartet (Gate)
- Melody Seq (Out) p> Bard Quartet (IN 4)
- Slow Seq (Out) >> Bard Quartet (HRMN)
- Bard Quartet (OUT 1) p> Bass VCO (V/Oct)
- Bard Quartet (OUT 2) p> Pad VCO A (V/Oct)
- Bard Quartet (OUT 3) p> Pad VCO B (V/Oct)
- Bard Quartet (OUT 4) p> Lead VCO (V/Oct)

patchIdeas.name: Generative Feedback Patch
patchIdeas.patch: CH1 OUT attenuated feeds CH2 IN · CH2 feeds CH3 · CH3 feeds CH4 · quantized feedback network · all channels on different scales (Pentatonic/Whole Tone/Blues/Dorian) · TRIG cascades S&H
patchIdeas.diagram:
BARD QUARTET:
* CH1=Pent · CH2=Whole · CH3=Blues · CH4=Dorian
- Random LFO (Out) >> Bard Quartet (IN 1)
- Bard Quartet (OUT 1) -> Attenuator (In) // ~0.3 gain
- Attenuator (Out) >> Bard Quartet (IN 2)
- Bard Quartet (OUT 2) >> Bard Quartet (IN 3)
- Bard Quartet (OUT 3) >> Bard Quartet (IN 4)
- Bard Quartet (TRIG) c> Clock Divider (In)
- Clock Divider (Out) g> Bard Quartet (Gate)

patchIdeas.name: Chord Quality Morph via Microtune
patchIdeas.patch: Static root/3rd/5th/7th CVs on CH1-4 · same notes across all 8 harmonies · 3rd-degree note detuned +0¢ (major) through -17¢ (neutral) to -50¢ (minor) across harmonies · HRMN LFO morphs chord quality
patchIdeas.diagram:
BARD QUARTET:
* 3rd detune 0¢→-17¢→-50¢ across H1-8
- Static CV 1 (Out) p> Bard Quartet (IN 1)
- Static CV 2 (Out) p> Bard Quartet (IN 2)
- Static CV 3 (Out) p> Bard Quartet (IN 3)
- Static CV 4 (Out) p> Bard Quartet (IN 4)
- Slow LFO (Out) >> Bard Quartet (HRMN) // morphs maj↔min
- Bard Quartet (OUT 1) p> VCO 1 (V/Oct)
- Bard Quartet (OUT 2) p> VCO 2 (V/Oct)
- Bard Quartet (OUT 3) p> VCO 3 (V/Oct)
- Bard Quartet (OUT 4) p> VCO 4 (V/Oct)

patchIdeas.name: Scene Recall Song Mode
patchIdeas.patch: 10 memory slots = 10 song sections · drum trigger → Counter → CV steps slot recall · HRMN walks chord within each scene · Slot 1 intro / 2 verse / 3 chorus etc.
patchIdeas.diagram:
BARD QUARTET:
* 10 memory slots = song sections
- Drum (Trig) t> Counter (Clock)
- Counter (CV) >> Bard Quartet (Memory Recall) // section stepping
- Sequencer (Out) >> Bard Quartet (HRMN)
- Bard Quartet (OUT 1) p> VCO 1 (V/Oct)
- Bard Quartet (OUT 2) p> VCO 2 (V/Oct)
- Bard Quartet (OUT 3) p> VCO 3 (V/Oct)
- Bard Quartet (OUT 4) p> VCO 4 (V/Oct)

patchIdeas.name: Quad S&H Chord Cloud
patchIdeas.patch: Four incommensurate LFOs (0.1/0.13/0.17/0.23 Hz) → CH1-4 · slow clock gates T&H · pentatonic all channels · octaves -2/-1/0/+1 · TRIG OUT taps tape delay for shimmering chord cloud
patchIdeas.diagram:
BARD QUARTET:
* Pentatonic all CH · oct -2/-1/0/+1
- LFO 1 (0.10Hz) >> Bard Quartet (IN 1)
- LFO 2 (0.13Hz) >> Bard Quartet (IN 2)
- LFO 3 (0.17Hz) >> Bard Quartet (IN 3)
- LFO 4 (0.23Hz) >> Bard Quartet (IN 4)
- Slow Clock (Out) g> Bard Quartet (Gate)
- Bard Quartet (OUT 1) p> VCO 1 (V/Oct)
- Bard Quartet (OUT 2) p> VCO 2 (V/Oct)
- Bard Quartet (OUT 3) p> VCO 3 (V/Oct)
- Bard Quartet (OUT 4) p> VCO 4 (V/Oct)
- Bard Quartet (TRIG) t> Tape Delay (Tap)
